headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Looks Close To Fair Value Today
summary: Intuitive Surgical stock has returned 28.4% over the past five years, yet its current checks point to a company that is not clearly cheap, with an intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model sitting close to the market price while earnings based multiples lean expensive. Over five years, a 28.4% share price gain suggests Intuitive Surgical has rewarded patient holders, even though shorter term returns have been weaker. Growth expectations tied to expanding robotic...

headline: Is Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Fairly Valued On Its Recall News?
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is in focus after voluntarily recalling certain Da Vinci surgical system components tied to a potential E-brake pin issue. This development is prompting fresh attention on product risk and how it might factor into the stock. See our latest analysis for Intuitive Surgical. Against this backdrop, Intuitive Surgical’s short term share price momentum has softened, with the stock down 4.5% over the past week and 9.7% over the past 90 days. However, the 3 year total...
